name: Lead - Validate Hold Fields
Lead - Validate Site Visit Scheduled
Lead - Create Opportunity on Qualification
script: # Create Opportunity when Lead workflow state is Qualified if doc.workflow_state == "Qualified": # Check if Opportunity already exists existing_opp = frappe.db.exists("Opportunity", {"party_name": doc.name, "opportunity_from": "Lead"}) if not existing_opp: opp = frappe.new_doc("Opportunity") opp.opportunity_from = "Lead" opp.party_name = doc.name opp.opportunity_type = "Sales" opp.status = "Open" opp.source = doc.source opp.territory = doc.territory # Copy custom fields from Lead opp.custom_k_number = doc.get("custom_k_number") opp.custom_required_load_kw = doc.get("custom_required_load_kw") opp.custom_state = doc.get("state") opp.custom_city = doc.get("city") opp.custom_proposed_system = doc.get("custom_proposed_system") opp.insert(ignore_permissions=True) frappe.msgprint( msg=f'Opportunity {opp.name} created successfully', title="Success", indicator="green" )

name: Lead - Create Site Visit on Scheduled
script: # Create Site Visit Initial when Lead is Site Visit Scheduled if doc.workflow_state == "Site Visit Scheduled" and doc.get("custom_preferred_visit_date"): # Check if Site Visit already exists existing_visit = frappe.db.exists("Site Visit Initial", {"lead": doc.name}) if not existing_visit: visit = frappe.new_doc("Site Visit Initial") visit.lead = doc.name visit.visit_type = "Preliminary" visit.preferred_site_visit_date = doc.get("custom_preferred_visit_date") visit.preferred_time_slot = doc.get("custom_preferred_time_slot") visit.preferred_visit_days = doc.get("custom_preferred_visit_days") visit.insert(ignore_permissions=True) # Set flag that site visit is created frappe.db.set_value("Lead", doc.name, "custom_site_visit_created", 1, update_modified=False) frappe.msgprint( msg=f'Site Visit Initial {visit.name} created successfully', title="Success", indicator="green" )

name: Site Visit Initial - Validate Scheduled
Site Visit Initial - Auto Set Check-in Time
Site Visit Initial - Auto Set Check-out Time
Site Visit Initial - Set Reviewer
Site Visit Initial - Validate Before Complete
Site Visit Initial - Create Quotation on Submit
script: # Create Quotation when Site Visit Initial is submitted if doc.docstatus == 1: # Find the Opportunity linked to this Lead opportunity = frappe.db.get_value("Opportunity", {"party_name": doc.lead, "opportunity_from": "Lead"}, "name") if opportunity: # Check if Quotation already exists for this Site Visit existing_quot = frappe.db.exists("Quotation", {"custom_site_visit": doc.name}) if not existing_quot: quot = frappe.new_doc("Quotation") quot.quotation_to = "Lead" quot.party_name = doc.lead quot.opportunity = opportunity # Link to Site Visit and fetch data quot.custom_site_visit = doc.name quot.custom_k_number = doc.k_number quot.custom_recommended_system_size_kw = doc.proposed_kw or doc.approved_kw quot.custom_city = doc.city quot.custom_state = doc.state quot.custom_proposed_system = doc.proposed_system # Set transaction date to avoid validation errors quot.transaction_date = frappe.utils.today() # Add proposed system as main item in quotation if doc.proposed_system: item_details = frappe.db.get_value("Item", doc.proposed_system, ["description", "standard_rate"], as_dict=True) quot.append("items", { "item_code": doc.proposed_system, "qty": 1, "rate": item_details.standard_rate if item_details else 0, "description": item_details.description if item_details else None }) # Get default BOM for the proposed system and add to custom BOM items table bom = frappe.db.get_value("BOM", {"item": doc.proposed_system, "is_default": 1}, "name") if bom: # Fetch BOM items bom_items = frappe.get_all( "BOM Item", filters={"parent": bom}, fields=["item_code", "qty", "uom"] ) # Add BOM items to custom_bom_items table (uses Survey BOM Item child doctype) for bom_item in bom_items: quot.append("custom_bom_items", { "item": bom_item.item_code, "qty": bom_item.qty, "uom": bom_item.uom }) quot.flags.ignore_mandatory = True quot.flags.ignore_validate = False quot.insert(ignore_permissions=True) # Update Opportunity with Site Visit link and link quotation to site survey frappe.db.set_value("Opportunity", opportunity, "custom_site_survey", doc.name) # Find and link quotation to Site Technical Survey if exists tech_survey = frappe.db.get_value("Site Technical Survey", {"lead": doc.lead}, "name") if tech_survey: frappe.db.set_value("Site Technical Survey", tech_survey, "reference_quotation", quot.name) frappe.msgprint( msg=f'Quotation {quot.name} created successfully with BOM items.', title="Success", indicator="green" )

name: Site Technical Survey - Validate Before Complete
Site Installation Job - Validate Before Complete
Subsidy Application - Validate Before Submit
Service Request - Validate Before Progress
Service Visit - Validate Before Complete
Site Visit Initial - Create Technical Survey
script:
# Create Site Technical Survey and Quotation when Site Visit is Completed if doc.workflow_state == "Completed": created_docs = [] survey_name = None # 1. Create Site Technical Survey existing_survey = frappe.db.exists("Site Technical Survey", {"site_visit_initial": doc.name}) if not existing_survey: survey = frappe.new_doc("Site Technical Survey") survey.site_visit_initial = doc.name survey.lead = doc.lead survey.k_number = doc.k_number survey.customer_name = doc.customer_name survey.contact_number = doc.contact_number survey.address = doc.address survey.city = doc.city survey.state = doc.state survey.pincode = doc.pincode survey.subsidy_required = doc.subsidy_required survey.finance_required = doc.finance_required survey.vendor = doc.get("assigned_vendor") survey.proposed_system = doc.proposed_system # Add BOM items to Site Technical Survey if doc.proposed_system: bom = frappe.db.get_value("BOM", {"item": doc.proposed_system, "is_default": 1}, "name") if bom: bom_items = frappe.get_all( "BOM Item", filters={"parent": bom}, fields=["item_code", "qty", "uom"] ) for bom_item in bom_items: survey.append("bom_items", { "item": bom_item.item_code, "qty": bom_item.qty, "uom": bom_item.uom }) survey.flags.ignore_mandatory = True survey.insert(ignore_permissions=True) survey_name = survey.name created_docs.append(f'Site Technical Survey {survey.name}') # 2. Create Quotation opportunity = frappe.db.get_value("Opportunity", {"party_name": doc.lead, "opportunity_from": "Lead"}, "name") if opportunity: existing_quot = frappe.db.exists("Quotation", {"custom_site_visit": doc.name}) if not existing_quot: quot = frappe.new_doc("Quotation") quot.quotation_to = "Lead" quot.party_name = doc.lead quot.opportunity = opportunity quot.custom_site_visit = doc.name quot.custom_k_number = doc.k_number quot.custom_recommended_system_size_kw = doc.proposed_kw or doc.approved_kw quot.custom_city = doc.city quot.custom_state = doc.state quot.custom_proposed_system = doc.proposed_system quot.transaction_date = frappe.utils.today() if doc.proposed_system: item_details = frappe.db.get_value("Item", doc.proposed_system, ["description", "standard_rate"], as_dict=True) quot.append("items", { "item_code": doc.proposed_system, "qty": 1, "rate": item_details.standard_rate if item_details else 0, "description": item_details.description if item_details else None }) # Add BOM items to Quotation bom = frappe.db.get_value("BOM", {"item": doc.proposed_system, "is_default": 1}, "name") if bom: bom_items = frappe.get_all( "BOM Item", filters={"parent": bom}, fields=["item_code", "qty", "uom"] ) for bom_item in bom_items: quot.append("custom_bom_items", { "item": bom_item.item_code, "qty": bom_item.qty, "uom": bom_item.uom }) quot.flags.ignore_mandatory = True quot.insert(ignore_permissions=True) created_docs.append(f'Quotation {quot.name}') if survey_name: frappe.db.set_value("Site Technical Survey", survey_name, "reference_quotation", quot.name) frappe.db.set_value("Opportunity", opportunity, "custom_site_survey", doc.name) if created_docs: frappe.msgprint(msg="Created:
" + "
".join(created_docs), title="Success", indicator="green")

name: Site Technical Survey - Create Installation Job
script:
# Create documents based on Site Technical Survey workflow state created_docs = [] # When Completed: Create Subsidy Application and Bank Loan Application if doc.workflow_state == "Completed": # 1. Create Subsidy Application if subsidy is required if doc.get("subsidy_required") == "Yes": existing_subsidy = frappe.db.exists("Subsidy Application", {"lead": doc.lead}) if not existing_subsidy: subsidy = frappe.new_doc("Subsidy Application") subsidy.lead = doc.lead subsidy.scheme = "PM-Surya Ghar" subsidy.status = "Draft" subsidy.k_number = doc.k_number subsidy.system_capacity = doc.proposed_system_size_kw subsidy.first_name = doc.customer_name subsidy.address_line_1 = doc.address subsidy.city = doc.city subsidy.state = doc.state subsidy.flags.ignore_mandatory = True subsidy.insert(ignore_permissions=True) created_docs.append(f'Subsidy Application {subsidy.name}') # 2. Create Bank Loan Application if finance is required if doc.get("finance_required") == "Yes": existing_loan = frappe.db.exists("Bank Loan Application", {"lead": doc.lead}) if not existing_loan: loan = frappe.new_doc("Bank Loan Application") loan.lead = doc.lead loan.k_number = doc.k_number loan.first_name = doc.customer_name loan.mobile_no = doc.contact_number loan.address_line_1 = doc.address loan.city = doc.city loan.state = doc.state loan.system_capacity_kw = doc.proposed_system_size_kw loan.flags.ignore_mandatory = True loan.insert(ignore_permissions=True) created_docs.append(f'Bank Loan Application {loan.name}') # When Approved: Create Site Installation Job if doc.workflow_state == "Approved": existing_job = frappe.db.exists("Site Installation Job", {"site_technical_survey": doc.name}) if not existing_job: job = frappe.new_doc("Site Installation Job") job.site_technical_survey = doc.name job.lead = doc.lead job.k_number = doc.k_number job.customer_name = doc.customer_name job.contact_number = doc.contact_number job.address = doc.address job.city = doc.city job.state = doc.state job.pincode = doc.pincode job.subsidy_required = doc.subsidy_required job.finance_required = doc.finance_required job.system_size_kw = doc.proposed_system_size_kw job.status = "Planned" job.vend = doc.get("vendor") # Fetch BOM items from Site Technical Survey and add to materials if doc.get("bom_items"): for bom_item in doc.bom_items: job.append("materials", { "item": bom_item.item, "qty_planned": bom_item.qty, "from_warehouse": None }) elif doc.get("proposed_system"): # If no bom_items in survey, fetch from BOM directly bom = frappe.db.get_value("BOM", {"item": doc.proposed_system, "is_default": 1}, "name") if bom: bom_items = frappe.get_all( "BOM Item", filters={"parent": bom}, fields=["item_code", "qty"] ) for bom_item in bom_items: job.append("materials", { "item": bom_item.item_code, "qty_planned": bom_item.qty, "from_warehouse": None }) job.flags.ignore_mandatory = True job.insert(ignore_permissions=True) created_docs.append(f'Installation Job {job.name}') if created_docs: frappe.msgprint( msg="Created:
" + "
".join(created_docs), title="Success", indicator="green" )

name: Site Installation Job - Create DISCOM Process
script:
# Create DISCOM Process when Installation Job is Completed if doc.workflow_state == "Completed": created_docs = [] # Check if DISCOM Process already exists existing_discom = frappe.db.exists("DISCOM Process", {"lead": doc.lead}) if not existing_discom: discom = frappe.new_doc("DISCOM Process") discom.lead = doc.lead discom.k_number = doc.get("k_number") discom.system_capacity_kw = doc.system_size_kw discom.status = "Draft" # Try to get DISCOM from lead lead_doc = frappe.get_doc("Lead", doc.lead) discom_value = lead_doc.get("custom_discom") if discom_value: discom.discom = discom_value else: discom.discom = "To Be Assigned" discom.flags.ignore_mandatory = True discom.insert(ignore_permissions=True) created_docs.append(f'DISCOM Process {discom.name}') # Check if Service Manual already exists existing_manual = frappe.db.exists("Service Manual", {"site_installation_job": doc.name}) if not existing_manual: manual = frappe.new_doc("Service Manual") manual.lead = doc.lead manual.k_number = doc.get("k_number") manual.site_installation_job = doc.name manual.installation_date = doc.get("actual_end") or doc.get("planned_end") or frappe.utils.today() manual.start_date = manual.installation_date # Get linked documents tech_survey = frappe.db.get_value("Site Technical Survey", {"lead": doc.lead}, "name") if tech_survey: manual.site_technical_survey = tech_survey survey_doc = frappe.get_doc("Site Technical Survey", tech_survey) manual.proposed_system = survey_doc.get("proposed_system") # Get site visit from technical survey if survey_doc.get("site_visit_initial"): manual.site_visit_initial = survey_doc.site_visit_initial # Set default service configuration manual.number_of_services = 4 manual.time_span_months = 3 manual.flags.ignore_mandatory = True manual.insert(ignore_permissions=True) created_docs.append(f'Service Manual {manual.name}') if created_docs: frappe.msgprint( msg="Created:
" + "
".join(created_docs), title="Success", indicator="green" )

name: DISCOM Process - Validate Before Apply
